name: Spaghetti with Zesty Marinara Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/8 teaspoon Hot red pepper flakes, or to taste
1 can No-salt-added tomatoes, crushed with liquid
1/2 cup Grated Parmesan cheese, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a heavy non-aluminum skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add garlic and onion; sauté until the vegetables are limp.
3. Stir in tomato paste, parsley, herbs, salt, black pepper, sugar, and red pepper flakes. Cook for 3-4 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Combine water, wine, bay leaf, tomato sauce, crushed tomatoes, and their liquid in a large pot. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
5. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 1-1.5 hours until the sauce thickens.
6. Remove the bay leaf from the pot.
7. Cook spaghetti according to package directions, omitting salt. Drain and serve with the sauce.
8. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese over the dish before serving.
This recipe freezes well. It makes 8 servings (2 ounces of spaghetti and 1/2 cup of sauce per serving). The sauce is intended for a healthful eating plan that includes no more than 30 percent daily calories from fat.
